articles.title: Boston man awaiting trial for allegedly dumping woman’s body found guilty of rape, strangulation
articles.description:
The man was convicted on six counts, including rape, and acquitted on four others, including kidnapping and assault and battery.

The post Boston man awaiting trial for allegedly dumping woman’s body found guilty of rape, strangulation appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Boston man convicted of rape and strangulation on May 17, 2026.
He faces six counts of conviction, including serious sexual offenses.
This case highlights ongoing concerns about violence against women in Boston.

articles.title: 10 random weekend shootings leave 4 injured in Austin, Texas, mayor says
articles.description:
The city ordered residents of a large part of the southern area of the Texas capital city to shelter in place Sunday while the search continues.

The post 10 random weekend shootings leave 4 injured in Austin, Texas, mayor says appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Austin, Texas experienced 10 random shootings over the weekend, injuring 4 individuals.
Residents in a large southern area were ordered to shelter in place on Sunday.
Boston residents should remain vigilant as similar incidents can occur in urban areas.

articles.title: Red Sox routed by Atlanta 8-1, drop series to Braves
articles.description:
The first-place Braves took two of three from Boston for their 13th win in 15 series this season.

The post Red Sox routed by Atlanta 8-1, drop series to Braves appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Red Sox lost 8-1 to Braves on May 17, 2026.
Braves secured their 13th win in 15 series this season.
Boston's playoff hopes diminish with series loss to top team.
